retrieved_result: Who wrote Jaws? Answers.com Wiki Answers Categories Animal Life Fish Saltwater Fish Sharks Who wrote Jaws? Answer by JBissohot Confidence votes 30 The 1975 novel Jaws was written by Peter Benchley The screenplay for the movie was written by Peter Benchley, Carl Gottleib and Howard Sackl
